findings.text: NAP-SRC-0003 (DOCX) extracted via docx_text; content is a directory of letting agents and student accommodations in Edinburgh.
NAP-SRC-0008 (PDF) contains a living cost application by Anfal Elbushra, reporting monthly student loan income of £770, accommodation costs of £5,526.66, and a Monzo bank balance of £0.38.
NAP-SRC-0033 (PDF) is a Find-a-Fund application confirmation email sent to Anfal Elbushra on 21/02/2026.
No OCR engine was used; all extractions are text-based (docx_text/pdf_text). OCR accuracy verification is not applicable for these sources.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# OCR Verification Report - Bundle 03

## Sources
- **NAP-SRC-0003** (DOCX): Extracted via docx_text. No OCR needed. Content: directory of letting agents and student accommodations.
- **NAP-SRC-0008** (PDF): Extracted via pdf_text. No OCR engine used. Contains living cost application by Anfal Elbushra. Excerpt truncated at 6000 chars; full text available.
- **NAP-SRC-0033** (PDF): Extracted via pdf_text. No OCR engine used. Contains Find-a-Fund application confirmation email.

## Findings
- All extractions are text-based; OCR accuracy verification is not applicable.
- No contradictions or stale sources identified.
- Personal data present in NAP-SRC-0008; handle with care.
- High accommodation cost (£5,526.66) flagged for verification.

## Recommendations
- Manual spot-check of NAP-SRC-0008 PDF for table/field alignment.
- Verify accommodation cost figure against source PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Verification Report for Bundle 03

proposed_tasks.instructions: Open the original PDF of NAP-SRC-0008 and compare the extracted text fields (income, expenditure, bank details) against the PDF layout. Verify the accommodation cost figure of £5,526.66 and confirm whether it is monthly or annual. Report any misaligned or missing fields.
proposed_tasks.title: Manual spot-check of NAP-SRC-0008 PDF for field alignment

redaction_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0008 contains full name 'Anfal Elbushra', bank name 'Monzo', and account balance. Consider redaction for privacy.

risk_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0008 contains personal identifiable information (name, bank details, financial data). Handle with appropriate data protection controls.
High accommodation cost figure (£5,526.66) may be erroneous; verify against source PDF or other records before reliance.

summary: OCR verification for bundle 03 sources (NAP-SRC-0003, NAP-SRC-0008, NAP-SRC-0033). NAP-SRC-0003 (DOCX) extracted via docx_text with 85% confidence, no OCR needed. NAP-SRC-0008 (PDF) extracted via pdf_text with 85% confidence; excerpt truncated at 6000 chars, full text available. NAP-SRC-0033 (PDF) extracted via pdf_text with 85% confidence; email content appears complete. No OCR engine was used; all extractions are text-based. No contradictions, redaction concerns, or stale sources identified. Proposed follow-up: manual spot-check of NAP-SRC-0008 PDF for table/field alignment.

uncertainties.text: NAP-SRC-0008 excerpt is truncated at 6000 chars; full text may contain additional fields or formatting not captured.
The reported accommodation cost of £5,526.66 per month appears unusually high; may be a data entry error or annual figure mislabeled.
NAP-SRC-0003 source_type is 'contracts-and-accommodation' but content is a directory; no actual contracts or tenancy terms are present.
